mission: tool/alien_grade_audit.hexa — deterministic 5-component HEXA-WEAVE alien-grade 1-10 measurement; replaces hand-estimated cycle 7-16 values (4.00 → 4.04 → 4.18 → 4.27) with re-derivable axis breakdown emitted to state/audit/alien_grade_events.jsonl. raw 91 C3 cycle-13 anomaly disclosed in proposal §3 (declared 4.18 un-realised in HEAD at the time; cycle-16 W9 re-apply reconciled).
user_directive: tool/alien_grade_audit.hexa 구현. HEXA-WEAVE alien-grade 정밀 측정.

lean_mechanical.source: grep ^axiom + grep ^theorem against lean4-n6/N6/MechVerif/Foundation/Axioms.lean for the 11 Felgner atomics

mvp_empirical.source: proposals/ exists-check for 6 F-TP5-b 90d MVP gate steps

falsifier_resolution.source: RESOLVED+PARTIAL-RESOLVED count / total via last-row dedup in falsifier_monitor audit.jsonl

aggregate_formula_rationale: cycle-12 census-compatible: cycle-7 anchor 4.0 + cycle-11 anchor 4 + (1/23) ≈ 4.04 + cycle-13 anchor 4 + (3/11)*0.4 + ... Each component contributes weighted slice above grade 4. Full saturation = grade 5; grade 6+ requires components not yet measured (Zenodo DOI, GPU empirical, AF-3 outperform).

first_measurement_cycle17.raw_91_c3_disclose: cycle-17 measurement 4.6742 > cycle-16 declared 4.27 because (a) post-stash-pop HEAD has 8/11 atomics not 5/11; (b) 5-component formula adds MVP infra + collision audit + falsifier resolution dimensions absent from cycle-12 single-axis census. Reading is honest and re-derivable.
